basics.name: Zachary Rothstein
basics.label: Clinical Healthcare | Career Transition from Software Engineering
basics.summary: Current ophthalmic technician intern with 2+ years as a software engineer and strong skills in documentation, client communication, and process improvement. Completing certifications in EKG technology, phlebotomy, and medical assisting (NHA CMA exam candidate, April 2026).

certificates.name: Certified Medical Assistant - CMA (In Progress, NHA Exam Candidate)

work.name: Eyenamics NY

Scribe physician notes in real time
Perform OCT scans, visual field tests, and color vision assessments
Process clinical orders through the EHR system

Recorded clinical notes and observed patient interactions

work.name: Mechanical Orchard

Regularly interfaced with client stakeholders to gather requirements and provide updates

work.name: Google Maps

Collaborated on hybrid teams, writing clear documentation, engaging in regular meetings, and integrating teammate feedback

work.name: Google Ads
